title: Surgeon Vacancy at Laurus Labs - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Laurus Labs - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Laurus Labs in Bhopal offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Laurus Labs:
Laurus Labs is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in NABH Standards

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Laurus Labs!
